title: Unofficial Russian translation of Vic's Point Blank
body:
Translation is unofficial

Vic's Point Blank is mod, not made by me (grassman, aka Diaterous)

This resource pack was made for [THIS MOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank) (click on blue text)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Перевод неофициальный

Vic's Point Blank - мод, несделанный мной (grassman, aka Diaterous)

Этот текстур пак сделан для [ЭТОГО МОДА](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank) (нажми на синий текст)
